originalTitle: ‘Buffett Indicator’ warns of a market top — 8 crucial signs that stocks are running on fumes
summary: From a grotesque 230% valuation gap to a ticking energy crisis, this unstoppable market is more fragile than it looks.
content: From a grotesque 230% valuation gap to a ticking energy crisis, this unstoppable market is more fragile than it looks.
chineseTitle: “巴菲特指标”警告市场已见顶——股市正在走下坡路的 8 个关键迹象
chineseSummary: 从怪异的 230% 估值差距到不断加剧的能源危机，这个势不可挡的市场比看起来更加脆弱。
chineseContent: 从怪异的 230% 估值差距到不断加剧的能源危机，这个势不可挡的市场比看起来更加脆弱。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
